mapper.insert: insert into assistant_turn_requests(user_id, request_id, turn_id, session_id, user_message_id, assistant_message_id, status, failure_code, created_at, updated_at, completed_at) values(#{userId}, #{requestId}, #{turnId}, #{sessionId}, #{userMessageId}, #{assistantMessageId}, #{status}, #{failureCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.select: select * from assistant_turn_requests where user_id=#{userId} and request_id=#{requestId}
mapper.update: update assistant_turn_requests set session_id=#{sessionId}, user_message_id=#{userMessageId}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} where id=#{id} and user_id=#{userId} and status='RUNNING'

update assistant_turn_requests set assistant_message_id=#{assistantMessageId}, status='COMPLETED', completed_at=#{completedAt}, updated_at=#{completedAt} where user_id=#{userId} and request_id=#{requestId} and status='RUNNING'

update assistant_turn_requests set status='FAILED', failure_code=#{failureCode}, completed_at=#{completedAt}, updated_at=#{completedAt} where user_id=#{userId} and request_id=#{requestId} and status='RUNNING'
